title: tillandsia moreliana
intro: Tillandsia moreliana, also known as the "Mexican Hat" or "Pink Poodle", is a species of epiphytic air plant that belongs to the Bromeliad family, characterized by its striking pink or red flowers and unique growth habit. Traditionally, Tillandsia moreliana has been used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties and ability to soothe irritated airways. The plant is also valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and other respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Tillandsia moreliana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote relaxation, ease congestion, and support overall respiratory health.
